heading: Connect to Online Archive and Cluster
body:
You can use the connection string for an online archive and cluster to
access and query data in your online archive and Atlas cluster.> **Note:** The connection string for an online archive and cluster
> is read-only. If you must write to your cluster,
> click **Connect to Cluster** and use the
> provided connection string instead.**Clusterspage:**Connect from Clusters PageTo get the connection string from the **Clusters** page:You can connect through a Driver,
Compass, and the MongoDB Shell.**Oapage:**Connect from Online Archive PageTo get the connection string from the **Online Archive**
page:You can connect through a Driver,
Compass, and the MongoDB Shell.
